ogTitle: Thanes Creek vs Thangool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Thanes Creek and Thangool.
heading: Thanes Creek vs Thangool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Thanes Creek, Queensland and Thangool, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Thangool has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Thanes Creek (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Thanes Creek or Thangool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Thanes Creek has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Thangool scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Thanes Creek scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Thangool scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Thanes Creek or Thangool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Thangool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
